name: split-home
task:
Split /home/ariel/Documents/anavi-main/anavi/client/src/pages/Home.tsx (1037 lines) into a pages/home/ subdirectory.

CONVENTIONS (MUST follow):
- This is a PUBLIC route — no DashboardLayout, no auth
- Max 800 lines per file
- Keep all existing logic identical — no behaviour changes
- Run pnpm check from anavi/ after done

STRUCTURE: Home.tsx has one export default function Home() (line 46) that contains all section JSX inline (no sub-functions). The sections are identified by id= attributes and comment landmarks inside the JSX:
- HeroSection: the opening section with headline, CTAs, trust badges
- MarqueeSection: scrolling logo strip
- ProblemSection (id='problem'): The Problem panels
- ThreeRolesSection: the three persona tiles
- StatsSection: numeric stats strip
- FeaturesSection (id='features'): feature cards grid
- HowItWorksSection (id='how-it-works'): numbered steps
- TrustSection (id='trust'): trust/compliance content
- SocialProofSection: testimonials or logos
- TestimonialCarouselSection: carousel
- EnterprisePricingSection: pricing/enterprise tier
- CTASection: final call to action
- FooterSection: footer

To identify exact line boundaries for each section, read the file first.

TARGET FILE STRUCTURE:
1. Create directory: client/src/pages/home/
2. Extract each logical section as its own component file:
   - client/src/pages/home/HeroSection.tsx

NOTE: Props needed between Home state and sections: Home manages persona picker state (showPersonaPicker, selectedPersona). Pass these as props to sections that need them, or lift state into index.tsx.
